resources.title: Zanzibar paper
resources.evidence_quote: That was largely when Google published the Zanzibar paper,

resources.title: GitHub permissions model video on AuthZed YouTube channel
resources.evidence_quote: I'll also just show there's some content on the Offset YouTube channel, which was invaluable to me when I was learning the SpaceDB, which is the session where you built think it was the GitHub permissions model video.

resources.title: AuthZed examples repository schemas directory
resources.evidence_quote: Something that I also found useful is examples repository, particularly the schemas directory.

resources.title: AuthZed Playground
resources.evidence_quote: And we also have the SpaceDB or the offset playground, which allows you to run tests against the models and definitions that you put together.

resources.title: SpiceDB Playground source
resources.evidence_quote: The Playground itself is open source, you could just run your own hosted instance, or you could just do it all inside Versus Code in your own editor.
